name: ButtonGroup

parameters.name: AriaLabel
parameters.description: Accessible name for the button group (exposes it to AT as a named role="group"). Roving tabindex is intentionally NOT forced here — a ButtonGroup commonly wraps independent actions that each need their own tab stop; use Toolbar for single-tab-stop/arrow-key navigation. (#270)

examples.title: Horizontal (default)
examples.code:
<ButtonGroup>
    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">
        <Blazicon Svg="Lucide.Bold" class="h-4 w-4" />
    </Button>
    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">
        <Blazicon Svg="Lucide.Italic" class="h-4 w-4" />
    </Button>
    <Button Variant="Button.ButtonVariant.Outline">
        <Blazicon Svg="Lucide.Underline" class="h-4 w-4" />
    </Button>
</ButtonGroup>

mdSummary:
# ButtonGroup

Button Group component.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Utility
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/button-group

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| ButtonGroup | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| ButtonGroup | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| ButtonGroup | Orientation | `Lumeo.Orientation` | `Lumeo.Orientation.Horizontal` |  |
| ButtonGroup | AriaLabel | `string?` | `` | Accessible name for the button group (exposes it to AT as a named role="group"). Roving tabindex is intentionally NOT forced here — a ButtonGroup commonly wraps independent actions that each need their own tab stop; use Toolbar for single-tab-stop/arrow-key navigation. (#270) |
| ButtonGroup | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (ButtonGroup) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects
- (none)

## Services it injects
- (none)

## Keyboard
—

## Example
```razor
<ButtonGroup />
```

## CSS variables
`--radius`

## Files
- `UI/ButtonGroup/ButtonGroup.razor`
